div.span:
Redis Queue
job_id in queue
priority ordering

Edge Job
apply Kubernetes patch
restart pod
toggle chaos

Agent Job
run investigation
check SLO
generate report

Agent Runtime
POST /invocations
creates incident jobs

Dashboard User
Manual trigger
remediation jobs

Scheduler
Periodic sync
health check jobs

1. Job Created
type: edge_task
or agent_task
status: queued

2. Job enqueued
to job_queue
cluster_id scoped

4. Task executed
edge or agent
logs events

5. Result persisted
status: completed
or failed
